subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the Word of Thy Command wherewith Thou didst create all contingent things and bring them into being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بکلمه امرک التی بها خلقت الممکنات و ذرئت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Word of God the cause of creation
